problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: If Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating is applied to low, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
